description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian, but it is rendered as a very small, nearly imperceptible dot in all views, lacking any discernible human features or details. The form is so minimal that no anatomical structure, clothing, or accessories are visible. The object appears as a single, isolated point with no visible limbs, head, or torso, and no indication of movement or posture. There are no visible textures, colors, or surface details to suggest material or clothing. The scale and lack of detail make it impossible to infer any specific characteristics about the individual. This representation is extremely abstract and does not provide any visual cues typical of a pedestrian adult.
description: A highly abstract, nearly invisible representation of an adult pedestrian, appearing as a tiny dot with no discernible features or details.
description_view_0: A single, minuscule dot is visible at the top center, with no distinguishable features.
description_view_1: The dot remains extremely small and isolated, with no additional detail visible.
description_view_2: A tiny, featureless point is present, lacking any anatomical or clothing cues.
description_view_3: The object is still a barely perceptible dot, with no change in detail or form.
